Rookie.consecutive_miss_bonus: +15% aim assist after missing a shot
Rookie.enemy_consecutive_hit_penalty: -10% aim penalty for enemies after hitting an XCOM unit
Rookie.hidden_mechanics: Shots with 50%+ real probability have hidden additional bonuses.

Veteran.consecutive_miss_bonus: +15% aim assist after missing a shot
Veteran.enemy_consecutive_hit_penalty: -10% aim penalty for enemies after hitting an XCOM unit
Veteran.hidden_mechanics: Maintains player assist after successive misses to avoid bad streaks.

Commander.consecutive_miss_bonus: +10% aim assist after missing a shot
Commander.enemy_consecutive_hit_penalty: None (enemies fire with their real aim)
Commander.hidden_mechanics: This is the highest difficulty with slight aim assist after misses.

Legend.hidden_mechanics: The percentage displayed on screen is 100% real. No mercy mechanics or assistance.

March (Start).prioridad_tactica: Kill the Trooper first (deals direct damage); leave the Sectoid for last (usually spends its first turn raising zombies or mind controlling, dealing no immediate damage).
March (Start).evento_clave: First contact with the first Chosen.

April.prioridad_tactica: Eliminate Stun Lancers immediately (they charge melee and can render your units unconscious or disoriented). Beware of the Officer's mark.

May.prioridad_tactica: Never melee attack a Muton (they have automatic counterattack and will knock you out). Use grenades to shred Muton cover.
May.evento_clave: Missions with complex SITREPs begin to appear.

June.prioridad_tactica: MECs fire micro-missiles in an area if your soldiers are grouped. Spread out your squad. Use Combat Protocol or EMP against MECs.

July.prioridad_tactica: Kill the Shieldbearer before they grant shields to allies. Archons use Blazing Pinions; move out of the red area during your turn.

August.prioridad_tactica: Focus fire on Sectopods. They have heavy armor and fire multiple times. Use Specialists with hacking or Bluescreen rounds.
August.evento_clave: Late game: extinction-level threats in tactical combat.

September (Late Game).prioridad_tactica: Final assault and preparation of the Avatar Project network.
September (Late Game).evento_clave: Access to the final mission at the ADVENT Fortress.

debilidades.descripcion: Receives increased damage (+50%) from attacks made by Reaper faction soldiers.
Receives increased damage (+50%) from attacks made by Skirmisher faction soldiers.
Receives increased damage (+50%) from attacks made by Templar faction soldiers.
Receives significant increased damage from explosives (grenades, missiles, claymores).
Takes massive additional damage from close range attacks (within 4 tiles) or melee.
Receives increased damage in the same turn if attacked 3 or more consecutive times.

fortalezas.descripcion: Does not trigger player reaction fire or Overwatch.
Generates energy shields whenever a player's shot misses them.
Immune to melee attacks (such as Ranger sword or Templar gauntlets).
Immune to mental status effects (panic, disorientation, mind control).
Teleports randomly to another cover immediately after taking damage.
Heals a fixed amount of health (e.g., 3-5 HP) at the start of each of their turns.
